name: @shamu/adapter-cursor
description: Cursor AgentAdapter for Shamu. ACP-stdio reference adapter (Phase 7.B). Launches `cursor-agent acp` and projects ACP session/update notifications + session/request_permission round-trips into Shamu's AgentEvent stream. Cursor Desktop ships the binary at ~/.local/bin/agent; override via vendorCliPath or CURSOR_AGENT_PATH.
